items.docs: Retrieve time series data for one or more BLS series IDs. Version 2 supports up to 50 series per request, date range filtering, optional calculations (net change, percent change), annual averages, and catalog descriptions. Requires a registered API key in the request body.

params.name: seriesId
params.description: The BLS series identifier (e.g., LNS14000000 for national unemployment rate, CUUR0000SA0 for CPI-U All Items)

params.name: registrationkey
params.description: Your registered BLS API key (required for v2 higher limits)

params.name: startyear
params.description: Beginning year for data range (4-digit year)

params.name: endyear
params.description: Ending year for data range (4-digit year)

params.name: catalog
params.description: Include series catalog/description information in response (v2 only)

params.name: calculations
params.description: Include net change and percent change calculations (v2 only)

items.docs: Retrieve time series data for a single BLS series ID using a GET request. This endpoint works with both v1 and v2. For v2, include the registration key as a query parameter for higher limits.
Returns a list of all BLS surveys with their abbreviations, names, and metadata. Use this endpoint to discover available survey types and their associated series prefixes.

params.name: surveyAbbreviation
params.description: The BLS survey abbreviation code (e.g., CU, LN, CE)

items.docs: Returns metadata and information for a specific BLS survey identified by its abbreviation code.

params.name: survey
params.description: Filter popular series by survey abbreviation

items.docs: Returns a list of the 25 most popular BLS series IDs across all surveys. Useful for discovering commonly referenced economic indicators.
